claims.summary: Phase transitions should be represented as explicit cards rather than inferred from blended prose.
claims.disposition: verify typed transition cards and rendering

claims.summary: Transition detection needs bounded thresholds to avoid event explosion.
claims.disposition: verify anti-explosion thresholds, cooldowns, and tests

claims.summary: A pending remote self-study can move from drift toward focus.
A joint transition requires witnessed evidence from both sides.
claims.disposition: verify joint-witness parentage and transition tests

claims.summary: Before and after state should remain available for review.
claims.disposition: verify transition snapshots, receipts, and compatibility rendering
